creator: billf@chc-chimes.com
text:
On Thu, 7 Jan 1999 pfgiffun@bachue.usc.unal.edu.co wrote:

>   # You can put any system dependent flags here.
>  -ExtraCFLAGS = 
> -+ExtraCFLAGS = -m486 -O2
> ++ExtraCFLAGS = -O2 -pipe -fno-strength-reduce

Nonsense. CFLAGS should be built from the system definition, and nothing
more or less.
